case_title: HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF VS. VALERIE SEUSEU

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,356.00 FILED BY HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO) AS TO DEFENDANT SEUSEU, VALERIE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-22-2021 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 14, 2021 AT 1:30 PM.

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-22-2021 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JUL-08-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-14-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF CCSF, REPRESENTED BY ROSALBA FARRELL, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VALERIE SEUSEU IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ROSALBA FARRELL, SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF (SAN FRANCISCO)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-14-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-06-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY OF THE CITY & COUNTY OF SF IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ROSALBA FERRELL SENIOR COLLECTIONS OFFICER. DEFENDANT VALERIE SEUSEU IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
